violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed 2 dry hand sinks at the beginning of the inspection.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Clean both freezers in the prep area.--Clean the following food contact surfaces: hot hold cabinet, 4 drawer unit on the line, can opener, dicer.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels. Back hand sink and Speak Easy were not provided with paper towels.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Clean the walk in cooler floors. Deep clean the ceiling in the kitchen.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Clean/degrease the back alley sidewalk area.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Clean the interior of the Norlake freezer and the dairy rack in the walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - The ceilings and vents in the kitchen need to be deep cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Replace damaged ceiling tiles and duct tape on the ceiling in the kitchen.
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material - three spray bottles in the bar - was not clearly identified to indicated contents.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
